latin: Cur tam serius? vir pictus vultu cicatricoso subrisit. mundum ardere videre volebat. nulla ratio, nullum consilium — solum chaos.

questions.prompt: What does the painted man ask?

questions.target: To watch the world burn with no plan or reason
choices: To watch the world burn with no plan or reason

translation: Why so serious? The man with a painted, scarred face smiled. He wanted to watch the world burn. No reason, no plan — only chaos.
